creator: skv@FreeBSD.org
text:
>  OK, there is a bug in thrift build process which causes C++ library to
>  be skipped on FreeBSD. The fix is available here:
>  https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/THRIFT-1161

Hmm, I already sumbitted the same issue:

https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/THRIFT-1102

Anyway, thrift does not build with this patch.

-- 
Sergey Skvortsov
